commit.message:
fix: register service worker via SerwistProvider for iOS PWA

The service worker was built but never registered — SerwistProvider
from @serwist/next/react was missing. Also adds manifest id field
for stable iOS 16.4+ PWA identity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: disable navigationPreload for iOS PWA + sync-complete event

- Disable navigationPreload in SW (broke iOS standalone mode + offline)
- Move themeColor from metadata to viewport export (Next.js warning)
- Emit sync-complete event after syncPendingMutations succeeds
- CaeTab listens for sync-complete to refresh data immediately

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add alembic files to backend Dockerfile for railway up deploys

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: video upload webm support + PWA standalone mode preservation

- Add "webm" to CAE_ALLOWED_TYPES (backend rejected MediaRecorder output)
- Add 5min timeout to file upload requests (was 30s global default)
- Replace hard location.href redirects with event-based auth-logout pattern
- Use router.replace instead of router.push for PWA navigation stability
- Add viewport export to root layout for iOS PWA rendering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: PWA login scope, video upload corruption, CAE form responsiveness

- Move PWA meta tags from terrain layout to root layout metadata API
  so Safari sees them on /login (standalone mode works)
- Fix video upload: skip File double-wrapping when compressImage returns
  original file unchanged (compressed === file check)
- Make CAE/VT form responsive: sidebar collapses to horizontal scroll
  on mobile, wizard grids stack vertically on small screens

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: accessibility WCAG AA, bundle optimization, 45 new E2E tests

- Accessibility: skip-to-content, aria-labels, focus-visible, sr-only, landmark roles
- Bundle: lazy loading landing sections, tree-shaking lucide/framer-motion, LazyMotion
- E2E: pricing, legal, error-states, responsive tests (63 total)
- shadcn moved to devDependencies

commit.message:
docs: update PROGRESS.md with PWA Sessions 1-4 completion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline file uploads with image/video compression (Session 4)

Photos compressed via Canvas API (5MB→300KB), videos capped at 1Mbps
bitrate (15MB→6MB). Files queue in IDB when offline, sync via FormData
through Axios on reconnect.

- compress-image.ts: Canvas API compression (max 1920px, JPEG 80%)
- offline-cae-service.ts: uploadFile, syncFileUpload, storage quota check
- cae-tab.tsx: handleFileUpload uses offlineCaeService (online + offline)
- video-record-dialog.tsx: videoBitsPerSecond 1Mbps cap

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline VT form — mutation queue + sync on reconnect (Session 3)

Queue VT field saves in IndexedDB when offline, sync automatically
via Axios (main thread) on reconnect with 30s polling interval.

- mutation-queue.ts: IDB CRUD with 5-retry limit
- sync-status.tsx: compact offline/pending/syncing/synced indicator
- use-sync-status.ts: polling hook for pending mutation count
- layout.tsx: SyncStatus component + online event listener + periodic sync

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline caching infrastructure — IDB schema + online status hook (Session 2)

- db.ts: IndexedDB schema with mutation-queue, offline-files, cae-cache stores
- constants.ts: cache TTL configuration
- use-online-status.ts: reactive hook for navigator.onLine state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: PWA foundation — installable app with service worker (Session 1)

Add web app manifest, Serwist service worker, install prompt banner,
and configure Next.js build pipeline for PWA generation.

- manifest.json: standalone terrain app with icons
- sw.ts: Serwist service worker with terrain-scoped caching
- install-prompt.tsx: bottom banner with 7-day dismiss cooldown
- next.config.mjs: wrapped with @serwist/next plugin
- Dockerfile.prod: copy public assets to standalone output
- Dependencies: @serwist/next, serwist, idb

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add force-dynamic to remaining API routes (searchParams, getAuthUser)

Covers ads, wallet, marketplace, purchases/verify, store/items,
and webhook routes that use dynamic request data at runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add force-dynamic to all API routes using cookies()

Prevents Next.js static rendering errors in production for all
authenticated routes that depend on runtime cookies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: production hardening — renewal price exposed, cron idempotency, dead types removed

- Add PRICE_RENEWAL to public settings whitelist so checkout reads it from DB
- Add FOR UPDATE lock in cron store order tx to prevent double stock decrement
- Remove dead pvSnapshot/totalPv/pv fields from store UI interfaces

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: remove dead PV code from verify cron and order email

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: enable plan renewal from UI + show $19 price in checkout

- planes/page: active plan button now shows "Renovar — $19" (clickable)
  instead of disabled "Plan activo"; routes to checkout?plan=X&renewal=true
- checkout: detect renewal=true param, show $19 (PRICE_RENEWAL setting),
  badge "Renovación", correct success messages and back navigation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add image upload to admin store product form

- File picker button next to each image URL input
- Uploads via existing /api/upload → Supabase Storage bucket
- Shows spinner while uploading, image preview after upload
- URL field still editable manually as fallback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: plan renewal at $19 + remove commission on upgrades/renewals

Renewal rules:
- First activation (NONE → plan): full price + 20% sponsor commission
- Upgrade (BASIC→PRO etc.): differential price, NO commission
- Renewal (same plan): fixed $19 USD, NO commission, extends expiry

Changes:
- pack-requests: allow same-plan renewal at $19 (AppSetting PRICE_RENEWAL);
  block only downgrades; extend plan_expires_at on renewal CRYPTO path
- admin/purchases: allow renewal approval; extend expiry (not reset);
  commission only when currentRank === 0
- purchases/verify cron: detect renewal by plan match; extend vs set plan;
  commission only on first activation
- activate-plan: allow renewal; extend expiry; commission only from NONE

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add nostia-expo and nostia-android platform folders

- nostia-expo: copy of nostia-mobile with react-native-maps replacing the broken react-leaflet map placeholder, location permissions declared in app.json, README documenting all placeholders
- nostia-android: full native Android app in Kotlin + Jetpack Compose with all 12 screens, Retrofit API layer, EncryptedSharedPreferences auth, FusedLocation GPS, Google Maps integration, README documenting all placeholders
- nostia-mobile/apply-scale.js: untracked utility file now tracked

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(otel): add OpenTelemetry bootstrap and runtime config (#5)

Summary:
- Add OTEL and Prometheus dependencies to mix.exs
- Create SymphonyElixir.OtelSetup GenServer with env-driven config
- Wire OtelSetup as child of Application supervisor
- Add OTEL metadata keys to logger config

Rationale:
- Enables optional observability pipeline gated by
  SYMPHONY_OBSERVABILITY_ENABLED env var so the app continues to
  work without any OTEL backend configured
- Configures exporter endpoint/protocol, resource attributes,
  telemetry handlers, and Prometheus metrics from runtime env

Tests:
- mix compile --warnings-as-errors: clean
- mix test: 254 tests, 1 pre-existing flaky failure (timing)
- mix lint: no issues

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: finetune.py — graceful GGUF export fallback + fuse step for supported arches

mlx_lm 0.31.0 does not support GGUF export for qwen2 architecture.
Add _fuse_adapter_to_gguf() that attempts fuse + export and falls back
cleanly when the architecture is unsupported. Adapter weights are preserved
at ~/.rain/adapters/mlx-lora/ and will be fused automatically once mlx_lm
adds qwen2 support. Also fix mlx_lm subcommand API (space-separated) and
--lora-layers → --num-layers rename in v0.31.0.

commit.message:
Classify SignedHexLiteralIsSigned → §5.7.1 [skip ci]

§5.7.1 defines that a base-format literal with the 's'/'S' sign specifier (e.g., 8'shFF) is treated as a signed integer. The test verifies exactly this: that result.is_signed is true for 8'shFF.

commit.message:
fix(umami): move plaintext secrets to SealedSecret

DATABASE_URL, APP_SECRET, and POSTGRES_PASSWORD were hardcoded in
manifests (APP_SECRET was still the placeholder string). All three
are now injected via a Bitnami SealedSecret. The running PostgreSQL
password was updated in-cluster before this commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add auto-update toggle for containers/stacks, compact container layout

Auto-update: server-side policies per container or compose stack, checked
on each telemetry push. When update_available is detected for a matching
policy, a docker_update command is dispatched automatically (30min cooldown).

Container view: reworked from card grid to compact row-based layout with
bordered group cards showing running/total counts, fitting far more
containers on screen.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: comprehensive site audit fixes + new pages & tools

Security: remove @ts-nocheck from seo-checker server action, fix 3 hidden
type errors (logAction args, email return type, ActionResult fields type).

SEO: add OpenGraph + Twitter metadata to contact, privacy, terms, about,
glossary, tools pages. Fix tool count inconsistency. Fix dynamic dates on
legal pages. Add llms.txt for AI discoverability.

Accessibility: add aria-expanded + Escape key handler + aria-label on
mobile menu. Add nav wrappers with aria-labels to footer. Add ARIA
attributes to ROI calculator range slider.

UX: add Header/Footer to contact, privacy, terms pages. Fix dead pricing
buttons (now link to seo-checker/contact). Add global error boundary and
tools loading skeleton.

New content: alternatives pages, comparison pages, use-case pages,
how-to guides, blog system, industry-specific SEO checker pages,
5 new tools (broken-link-checker, http-header-checker, open-graph-checker,
ssl-checker, word-counter), expanded glossary, checkpoint evaluator.

commit.message:
feat: automated X posts via Vercel cron jobs

Two daily posts, no spoilers, no location names:

  daily-drop  (12:00 UTC = 7am ET)  "Day #N is live 📍 ..."
  daily-stats (01:00 UTC = 8pm ET)  "Day #N is done — avg score X/1000"

- api/social.js: X API v2 posting with pure-Node OAuth 1.0a (no deps)
  - Auth: x-vercel-cron header (cron) or x-cron-secret header (manual test)
  - daily-drop: fetches day number, posts morning announcement
  - daily-stats: fetches yesterday's avg from getDailyAvgScore(), skips
    silently if no data (e.g. very early days with zero completions)
- vercel.json: replace orphaned /api/daily-post cron with two new ones

Env vars needed in Vercel: X_API_KEY, X_API_SECRET, X_ACCESS_TOKEN,
X_ACCESS_TOKEN_SECRET, SOCIAL_CRON_SECRET (for manual testing)

commit.message:
fix(web): fix blank share card PNGs and clipboard copy fallback (#129)

## Summary
- Separate off-screen positioning wrapper from `bind:this` target so
`modern-screenshot` clone doesn't inherit `left:-9999px` (renders all
pixels transparent)
- Pre-capture share card blobs eagerly via `$effect` so clipboard writes
happen within the user gesture window instead of expiring during async
`domToBlob`

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
fix(pills): use correct ai@6 part type 'tool-add_to_packing_list'

'dynamic-tool' is only for truly unregistered tools; server-streamed
tools from toUIMessageStreamResponse() use the concrete 'tool-{name}'
type. Also derive done state from inv.state === 'output-available' so
pills stay in their completed state across component remounts.

feat: TrendPulse v4.0 — trend memory, breaking alerts, bana gore filter

- 14-day trend lifecycle tracking (new/rising/peak/declining)
- Breaking alert system (HN 500+, Reddit 1000+, $0 cost, 6x daily)
- Personal "Bana Gore" filter (solo_dev, low_budget, turkey_market scoring)

commit.message:
程式碼品質與安全性優化 (v1.2.0)

## 🔒 資料庫交易保護
- 實作 CreateOrderWithTransactionAsync 方法
- 確保訂單建立、庫存扣除、購物車清空的原子性（ACID）
- 防止並發訂單導致超賣問題

## ⚡ 樂觀並發控制
- Album 模型新增 [Timestamp] RowVersion 欄位
- 防止庫存更新時的並發衝突
- 資料庫層級的 rowversion 自動檢測並發修改

## 🧹 程式碼重構（DRY 原則）
- 移除 Controller 層重複驗證邏輯（統一由 Service 層處理）
- 萃取 GetAuthorizedUserId() 輔助方法（消除 8 處重複）
- 萃取 ReturnCheckoutViewWithDataAsync() 錯誤處理方法
- 優化購物車總計查詢（避免重複資料庫查詢）

## 🛒 訂單結帳流程完善
- 實作完整的結帳資訊收集（收件人、地址、配送方式、付款方式、發票資訊）
- 支援三種配送方式（宅配、7-11、全家）
- 支援三種發票類型（二聯式、三聯式、電子發票）
- 台灣縣市鄉鎮區級聯選單

## 🎨 UI 優化
- 購物車與結帳頁面色彩調整（移除刺眼藍紫漸層）
- 統一使用柔和紫色（#b19cd9）與導覽列、Footer 一致
- 專輯列表頁面支援格狀/清單視圖切換

## 📚 文件更新
- 更新 CLAUDE.md 與 README.md 至 v1.2.0
- 新增開發指引與最佳實踐說明
- 新增核心業務流程圖（購物車到訂單）
- 新增交易保護與並發控制機制說明
- 參考資源導引到 K-MONSTAR

1. Client Timeline - unified activity feed merging appointments,
   loyalty events, formulas, notes, and system events
2. Smart Segmentation - 9 dynamic segments (VIP, lapsed, high spender,
   birthday this week, new this month, missing contact info)

   stylist, medical/allergy notes

   with service name and notes per client
5. Loyalty Points - earn/redeem/adjust points with full transaction
   history and running balance
6. Client Self-Service Portal - (backend ready, frontend portal TBD)
7. Merge Duplicates - detect duplicates by phone/email, one-click
   merge that moves all appointments, formulas, loyalty, and timeline
8. Import/Export - CSV export of all clients, CSV import with
   duplicate detection and field mapping

DB migration: 005_client_360.sql (3 new tables, 5 new columns on
clients, RLS policies, indexes)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Classify UnsignedBaseLiteralNotSigned → §5.7.1 [skip ci]

§5.7.1 states that numbers specified with a base format are treated as unsigned integers if the s designator is absent. The test checks that 4'd3 (no s prefix) evaluates with is_signed == false, width == 4, and value == 3, directly verifying this rule.

commit.message:
fix: track answered questions client-side to prevent repeats

The adaptive router queried Supabase for answered questions, but the
fire-and-forget log write hadn't completed by the time the next
question was fetched — causing the same question to appear again.

Fix: practice page now tracks answered question IDs in a client-side
ref and passes them as excludeIds to the API. The router merges these
with database-tracked IDs, guaranteeing no repeats even before the
database write completes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: slow down v4 turbulence flicker, fix v3 drift animation

V4: Reduce seed range from 0-100 to 0-5 over 12s (was 8s) so the
turbulence morphs slowly like breathing flame instead of flickering.
Lower baseFrequency and displacement scale for subtler distortion.

V3: Gradients weren't animating because background-position can't
override positions baked into the gradient's 'at' syntax. Removed
'at' from gradients and use background-position + background-size
for placement so the keyframes actually drift.

commit.message:
feat: auditoría IVA descontable — separar fuentes y detectar doble conteo

Problema: IVA descontable sumaba journals 2408 + purchase tax_value,
causando potencial doble conteo cuando Siigo genera ambos registros.

Cambios:
- IVA descontable ahora usa SOLO journals 2408 como fuente contable
- Muestra ambas fuentes (CC vs FC) lado a lado para comparación
- Card de diagnóstico con warning si totales son similares
- Detalle expandible por proveedor/documento
- En tabla P&L, expandir IVA Descontable muestra ambas fuentes por mes
- Ref: Art. 483-488 Estatuto Tributario colombiano
